Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of SW-AE Assign Reviewers when followed by SW-Reviewer Declined compared to when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer No Response in variants containing reviewer non-responsiveness
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the subsequent occurrence of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total elapsed time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Unavailable
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Average time it takes SW-AE Assign Reviewers to be repeated before resulting in SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-AE Recommendation overdue in long-running review cycles
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants leading to SW-EIC Major Revision versus SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Total time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Selection is now due in delayed assignment paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Minimum time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to Assign a Different Editor when initial reviewer assignments fail
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Average time between consecutive executions of SW-AE Assign Reviewers before achieving a stable reviewer agreement
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases where multiple reviewers eventually agree
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'
